channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: I’ve tested more than 20 chargers that can juice up your phone and laptop, and these are the 4 I still choose to use in my real life, including a portable power bank and a wireless charger
item.description: Of all the chargers I've tested, these are the ones I've come to rely on above all others.

item.title: OpenAI annonce GPT-5.6 (Sol, Terra, Luna) mais en limite l’accès à la demande du gouvernement américain
item.description: OpenAI dévoile GPT-5.6, sa nouvelle famille de modèles, mais l’accès reste verrouillé : l’entreprise commence par une préversion réservée à quelques partenaires, à la demande du gouvernement américain.

item.title: Why everyone from OpenAI to SpaceX is building their own chips (and turning up the heat on Nvidia)
item.description: Nvidia has dominated the AI chip market for years, but the era of total dependence might be ending. OpenAI just shared its plans to spice things up with Jalapeño, its custom inference chip built with Broadcom, joining Google, Apple, and SpaceX in a growing list of companies building their way out of single-supplier risk. The goal is less of a […]

item.title: Autonomous security agents need complete data. Here's how to check if yours is ready.
item.description: An endpoint agent cannot report its own absence. The 2026 Axonius Actionability Report, conducted with the Ponemon Institute and surveying 662 IT and security professionals, put a number on a gap SOC teams have worked around for years. Across the Axonius customer base, 12.7% of devices in a 298,000-device median inventory are missing their expected security agent.If a device has no agent, no management console shows it. If a CMDB record is stale, no reconciliation flags it. An employee who installed Claude Enterprise outside procurement created a SaaS workspace, identity surface, and API-token...

item.title: Russian hackers were behind $2.5 billion hack of Jaguar Land Rover: Report
item.description: The hack on car giant Jaguar Land Rover last year was one the most disrupting, damaging, and costly hacks of the last few years.

item.title: I Just Saw That Eufy’s Floodlight Security Camera Is Cheaper Than Ever (2026)
item.description: If you want to beef up your home security this Prime Day, Eufy’s Floodlight Camera is a great way to do it.

item.title: It’s the last day of Prime Day — here are over 140 great deals to choose from
item.description: We’ve arrived at the final day of Prime Day, which at this point should probably be called “Prime Week.” We’ve found discounts on all manner of gadgets, including TVs, smart home tech, chargers, headphones, and more. Some of the best deals have started selling out at some retailers, so if you’ve been craving a popular […]

item.title: I love the Amazon Echo Dot Max so much, I just bought it twice — here's why that's the smartest purchase I made this week
item.description: My main quarrel with the Echo Dot Max were its list price and not-quite-great, not-quite-bad audio; so I've fixed those issues by buying a second one.

item.title: Tempted to switch to Garmin from Apple Watch? We've found 11 deals you won't want to miss to before Prime Day ends today
item.description: These Garmin smartwatches are solid, and much more affordable Apple Watch rivals this Prime Day.

item.title: OpenAI Has New AI Models. Here’s Why You Can’t Use Them
item.description: The White House asked OpenAI to delay the rollout of its GPT-5.6 AI models, two weeks after Anthropic had to take its most advanced AI models offline.

item.title: Quick! Before Prime Day ends, upgrade to one of these talented Xbox controllers — I’ve tracked down the most phenomenal pads on the market and found the last-minute bargains you can’t afford to miss
item.description: Check out my guide to the greatest gamepads out there this Prime Day and get your hands on one last deal to help you play all those new games.

item.title: OpenAI unveils GPT-5.6 amid US AI regulatory drama
item.description: Less than 24 hours after news broke that OpenAI would stagger its next model release at the request of the Trump administration, that model, GPT-5.6, is here. On Friday, the company unveiled the limited preview of its new GPT 5.6 model suite: Sol, the flagship; Terra, a medium-tier model for "high-volume work"; and Luna, a […]

item.title: Prediction market giant Polymarket hit by cyberattack, with company confirming user funds stolen — here is what we know
item.description: Polymarket confirms user funds affected and says it's refunding them in full.

item.title: OpenAI unveils GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra and Luna models — but only accessible to limited preview partners for now, per US Gov
item.description: OpenAI is announcing a limited preview of its next-generation GPT-5.6 model series today, introducing three distinct, capability-tiered models—Sol, Terra, and Luna—designed to re-engineer developer and enterprise workflows. The initial rollout is available through the API and Codex to a narrow set of approximately 20 total organizations after OpenAI shared the models and release plans with the U.S. government, following an executive order issued by President Donald J. Trump earlier this month on June 2, 2026, which calls upon various federal agencies to collaborate on a process for benchmarkin...

item.title: How to watch Norway vs. France online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Norway vs. France in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: J’ai testé les Bose Lifestyle Ultra Speakers : petites enceintes, grosse ambition
item.description: Compactes, élégantes et bien plus polyvalentes qu'il n'y paraît, les Bose Lifestyle Ultra Speakers peuvent fonctionner seules ou en paire stéréo, sans forcément accompagner la barre Lifestyle Ultra. Une approche qui transforme de simples enceintes surround en véritables enceintes connectées haut de gamme.

item.title: Last chance? Samsung's record-low Galaxy S26 Ultra deal could disappear tonight — get $350 off instantly without trading
item.description: Don't overlook Samsung's Summer sale if you want a great deal this week, you can get the Galaxy S26 Ultra for its lowest-ever upfront price.

item.title: Smart lock maker Level has been gutted and its founders are out
item.description: Assa Abloy has laid off the majority of staff at Level Home, the smart lock company known for building smart tech into traditional-looking deadbolts, and is folding the business into Kwikset, according to a source familiar with the decision. The Verge obtained exclusive details from a person familiar with the restructuring who requested anonymity as […]...

item.title: LG C5 vs. Samsung S90F: Id only buy one of these OLED TVs for Prime Day 2026
item.description: The LG C5 OLED TV is on sale for Prime Day, but so is one of our favorite Samsung OLED TVs. Which should you buy on sale at Amazon?

item.title: PlayStation CEO says Sony will be 'leveraging technologies that can be used in various forms and locations' for future consoles, potentially suggesting a PS6 handheld is in the cards
item.description: A new PlayStation handheld could be on the table after comments from PlayStation's CEO suggest Sony wants to create hardware similar to the Nintendo Switch 2.

item.title: Why your next Xbox, iPad, or laptop may suddenly cost hundreds more
item.description: Tech giants say AI demand is creating shortages that are pushing prices higher for consumers. There’s no doubt about it: the general public is turning against AI. They are worried it will steal their jobs, destroy the environment, and even kill innocents. And given that two of the biggest companies on the planet have now squarely placed the blame on AI-fueled shortages for forcing them to raise prices on popular tech gadgets and devices, consumers are likely to double down on their loathing for the technology....

item.title: Markiplier chats to Mashable about being a VidCon Hall of Famer
item.description: Mashable chatted to YouTuber and filmmaker Markiplier at VidCon 2026 as one of the inductees of the Hall of Fame.

item.title: Don’t miss Prime Day’s best TV deals! I’ve picked great offers on TVs we’ve reviewed and rate highly, including OLEDs from LG and Samsung, big-screen TCL TVs and more
item.description: I've rounded up the best TV deals on TVs we've tested here at TechRadar before Prime Day comes to a close.

item.title: Aibo, le chien robot de Sony, tire sa révérence
item.description: Environ 8 ans après sa sortie, le chien robot Aibo signé Sony est retiré de la vente. La fin d'une ère pour le successeur d'une machine sortie avant l'année 2000.

item.title: Tesla settles FSD crash lawsuit as federal investigations continue
item.description: The lawsuit was connected to a fatal 2023 crash involving a vehicle using the company's advanced driver assistance system known as Full Self-Driving.

item.title: The Pentagon Is Looking Into the Dialog Data Exposure for Unmasking National Security Officials
item.description: Exposed records from the private group included the personal information of a senior White House intelligence official and an active-duty special operations officer.

item.title: TikTok’s road to becoming a super app
item.description: TikTok may be working to become the app that people use for most of their digital activities.

item.title: You won’t have long to get these iPad deals before Apple’s price hike
item.description: Apple just raised prices across its iPad and MacBook lineup. The good news is that many retailers are still selling their inventory at the old prices or far less, which means you can still score some of the best iPad deals we may see in awhile — if ever again. So if you’ve been thinking […]

item.title: It’s not about Anthropic vs. OpenAI anymore
item.description: AI models have progressed to the point where their capabilities have real political consequences. Dealing with those consequences will require collective action.

item.title: I think I've found my dream gaming chair this Prime Day — and no, it's not a Secretlab chair
item.description: My Prime Day gaming chair hunt has come to an end, as I've found the ideal option, but it isn't from Secretlab or Razer.

item.title: Buying a Kindle Colorsoft in the Prime Day deals extravaganza? Don't forget a case — these ones are all on sale too (for now)
item.description: Stylish, protective Kindle Colorsoft cases with big price cuts — and they'll all fit Paperwhite Kindles too.

item.title: Prime Day ends today: Last chance to score 150+ best deals on Apple, DJI, Kindle, and Lego favorites
item.description: Amazon's summer sale is ending soon. Shop the best Prime Day deals on Sony headphones, Samsung TVs, Kindles, and Apple Watches.

item.title: Polymarket: Hackers stole users funds
item.description: Hackers gained access to Polymarket funds via a third party vendor, moving potentially millions out of user accounts.

item.title: 27 Best Prime Day Beauty Deals of 2026 (We Sifted Through Hundreds to Pick Them)
item.description: It wouldn't be Amazon Prime Day without some beauty deals. Here's a roundup of all our favorites.

item.title: I've been looking for a smart speaker for the kitchen and this is my last chance to pick up the Amazon Echo Spot for 50% off
item.description: If you've been waiting to buy an Amazon Echo Spot, then time is running out on its Amazon Prime Day deal.

item.title: GTA 6 : les précommandes se vendent 6 fois plus sur PS5 que sur Xbox
item.description: Le média IGN rapporte que l'écrasante majorité des précommandes de GTA 6 se font sur PS5, avec un ratio de 6 pour 1 face à Xbox.

item.title: Hollywood is jumping into this mobile-friendly storytelling format, and it’s drawing in major stars
item.description: The Emmy-nominated actor Issa Rae says microdramas offer advantages over traditional media. While much of Hollywood was consumed by the streaming wars, Issa Rae was thousands of miles away studying a different mode of entertainment: microdramas.No stranger to creating a successful online series, the Emmy-nominated actor and producer became intrigued by China’s booming market for the short, mobile-first soap operas, seeing the format’s potential to build audiences and intellectual property.In May, Rae’s Hoorae Media released the thriller Screen Time, one of the first major studio-quality microd...

item.title: The Bear Season 5 gives Carmy one hell of a career pivot
item.description: By the end of "The Bear" Season 5, Carmy (Jeremy Allen White) is officially out of the food industry. Where does he end up?

item.title: The 16 best robot vacuum deals you can still get before Prime Day ends
item.description: If you’ve been wanting to buy a robot vacuum but have been put off by how much it can cost to get a good one, now is not a bad time to start looking. We’re now on the final day of Prime Day, and Amazon, along with retailers like Best Buy and Walmart, is still […]

item.title: New report reveals the Nintendo Switch 2 is the second fastest-selling video game hardware in US history, as Xbox and PS5 unit sales struggle
item.description: The Nintendo Switch 2 has hit a new sales record in the US in its first 12 months of release, but Xbox and PS5 console unit sales have seen a steep decline.

item.title: How to watch Norway vs France: Free Streams, TV Channels and Kick-Off time for FIFA World Cup 2026 as Erling Haaland starts on the bench, team news
item.description: Erling Haaland is rested as Norway manager Stale Solbakken makes wholesale changes for his side's clash with France at the FIFA World Cup 2026. Here's how to watch for free online and from anywhere as the two teams battle to finish top of Group I.

item.title: How to watch Senegal vs Iraq: Free Streams & TV Channels online from anywhere at FIFA World Cup 2026, team news
item.description: Ismaila Sarr leads the line for Senegal in their must-win clash with Iraq at the FIFA World Cup 2026. Here's how to watch the Group I fixture for free online and from anywhere.

item.title: I asked our tech experts for their top picks from Prime Day — here are the 19 tech deals you don't want to miss before sales end tonight
item.description: These are the ultimate Prime Day deals from 2026, as chosen by our team of tech experts.

item.title: Amazon Prime Day : voici les dernières offres Tech qui valent vraiment le coup
item.description: Dernières heures pour le Prime Day d'Amazon ! L'événement touche à sa fin aujourd'hui et c’est l’ultime occasion de faire de bonnes affaires. Découvrez notre sélection des meilleures offres mise à jour en temps réel pour dénicher les vrais bons plans avant qu'il ne soit trop tard.

item.title: FCC considers axing $2 billion school and library internet connectivity scheme — Chairman blames tablets for moving kids away from "turning pages in books, penciling out answers to math problems"
item.description: E-Rate has funded library and school Wi-Fi for networking infrastructure for nearly three decades – is it time to end it?

item.title: I Found the Best Prime Day Pixel Buds Deals: 2a, Pro (2026)
item.description: Google Pixel Buds are steeply on sale, presumably only through the end of the day.

item.title: J’adore la nouvelle console MSI Claw, mais je ne peux pas la recommander
item.description: La MSI Claw 8 EX AI+ a de quoi faire rêver, et représente un fer de lance magnifique pour les Intel G3 et G3X. Mais voilà : la crise actuelle fait qu'il est impossible de la recommander.

item.title: Prime Day’s Best Handheld Fan Deals, Up to 20% Off, Are About to Disappear (2026)
item.description: These are the best last-minute Prime Day discounts on handheld fans, from $10 budget buys to Shark’s high-tech ChillPill.

item.title: Xreal’s best USB-C smart glasses are $50 off, but not for long
item.description: If you’ve been curious about the emerging world of smart glasses, Prime Day is your chance to try some of the best models with a rare discount from Best Buy or directly from Xreal. The high-end Xreal One Pro is $549, $50 lower than the usual price, and the more entry-level Xreal 1S is $399, […]

item.title: 8 of the best portable Bluetooth speakers we've tested: top portable, punchy, outdoorsy, and affordable picks from JBL, Bose, and more
item.description: Get outdoors with my pick of the easy-breezy Bluetooth speaker deals live now, featuring savings on Bose, JBL, B&O and more
